fullText: center 83548 EX86 – RF Load Trailer Invalid oLPN Enhancements to Display Actual oLPN Status Configuration Guide Table of Contents TOC \o "1-3" \h \z \u 1. Global Extension Control Code Setup PAGEREF _Toc319111171 \h 2 1.1. Enablement System Code PAGEREF _Toc1391688517 \h 3 2. EX86 Extension Control Code ID PAGEREF _Toc945362477 \h 4 2.1. C-000-EX86 Creation PAGEREF _Toc2082717239 \h 4 2.2. C-000-EX86 Enablement PAGEREF _Toc1829649209 \h 5 3. Transaction Parameter Configuration PAGEREF _Toc2089759607 \h 6 3.1. RF Load Trailer Transaction PAGEREF _Toc481011153 \h 6 4. EX86 Error Messages PAGEREF _Toc383511956 \h 7 4.1 EX86 CUSTOM ERROR MESSAGES PAGEREF _Toc1625437349 \h 7 Global Extension Control Code Setup Enablement System Code Navigate to the system Code (Configuration) UI If system code C-000 (Global Extension Control) does not yet exist, click add. Populate the following information. 0 323850 Note: The checkbox “System code parameters exist” will auto populate upon completion of subsequent steps for adding parameters, and it is un - editable to the user. Click Save. Next, click the code IDs action Button. The system code IDs screen is displayed. Click Add. 0 323850 0 0 Populate the following information provided above. Click Save. Next, click the parameters Action button located on the bottom right of the screen to navigate back to the system code parameter screen. System Code Parameters Screen is displayed. Click Add Button. 0 323850 0 0 Populate the following information above. Click Save. Click on the parameters Tab. Check the box to enable all custom functionality. 0 324485 Click Save. EX8 6 Extension Control Code ID C-000-EX8 6 Creation Navigat e to System Codes UI in WM. We will need to add Custom code C-000- EX8 6 if it has not been added. 0 196850 Search for system code C - 000 : Use the Custom Code drop-down option under the Record Type menu. Type in 000 for Code Type. Click apply to search. Click the Checkbox to select the system code. Click on the Code ID's action button in the lower right of the menu. Click ADD action button. Populate the fields with the information provided in the screenshot above. Click SAVE. C-000-EX8 6 Enablement Click the Blue Parameters Tab. Located next to the DETAILS tab. Check the box to enable all custom functionality. CLICK SAVE. Transaction Parameter Configuration RF Load Trailer Transaction Navigate to Transaction Parameters UI, Filter by Load Trailer Select Load Trailer RD program Transaction, and click Program Template Select Add and fill in the information below to add the 50 4 -50 4 Parameter and click Save. Enable EX8 6 504-504 parameter on the required load trailer transaction Select Load Trailer RD program Transaction, then click edit and then check the box to enable custom functionality Hit save . 4. EX86 Error Messages 4.1 EX86 CUSTOM ERROR MESSAGES    Navigate to the Messages UI then click on the Message Master Tab   Select ‘+’ in the upper right-hand side of screen.   Add values below if not already added.

[Document: MCLN EX86 RF Load Trailer Invalid oLPN Enhancements  to Display Actual oLPN Status Configuration Guide]

center 83548 EX86 – RF Load Trailer Invalid oLPN Enhancements to Display Actual oLPN Status Configuration Guide Table of Contents  1. Global Extension Control Code Setup  1.1. Enablement System Code  2. EX86 Extension Control Code ID  2.1. C-000-EX86 Creation  2.2. C-000-EX86 Enablement  3. Transaction Parameter Configuration  3.1. RF Load Trailer Transaction  4. EX86 Error Messages  4.1 EX86 CUSTOM ERROR MESSAGES  Global Extension Control Code Setup Enablement System Code Navigate to the system Code (Configuration) UI If system code C-000 (Global Extension Control) does not yet exist, click add. Populate the following information. 0 323850 Note: The checkbox “System code parameters exist” will auto populate upon completion of subsequent steps for adding parameters, and it is un - editable to the user. Click Save. Next, click the code IDs action Button. The system code IDs screen is displayed. Click Add. 0 323850 0 0 Populate the following information provided above. Click Save. Next, click the parameters Action button located on the bottom right of the screen to navigate back to the system code parameter screen. System Code Parameters Screen is displayed. Click Add Button. 0 323850 0 0 Populate the following information above. Click Save. Click on the parameters Tab. Check the box to enable all custom functionality. 0 324485 Click Save. EX8 6 Extension Control Code ID C-000-EX8 6 Creation Navigat e to System Codes UI in WM. We will need to add Custom code C-000- EX8 6 if it has not been added. 0 196850 Search for system code C - 000 : Use the Custom Code drop-down option under the Record Type menu. Type in 000 for Code Type. Click apply to search. Click the Checkbox to select the system code. Click on the Code ID's action button in the lower right of the menu. Click ADD action button. Populate the fields with the information provided in the screenshot above. Click SAVE. C-000-EX8 6 Enablement Click the Blue Parameters Tab. Located next to the DETAILS tab. Check the box to enable all custom functionality. CLICK SAVE. Transaction Parameter Configuration RF Load Trailer Transaction Navigate to Transaction Parameters UI, Filter by Load Trailer Select Load Trailer RD program Transaction, and click Program Template Select Add and fill in the information below to add the 50 4 -50 4 Parameter and click Save.

[Document: MCLN EX86 RF Load Trailer Invalid oLPN Enhancements  to Display Actual oLPN Status Configuration Guide]

CK SAVE. Transaction Parameter Configuration RF Load Trailer Transaction Navigate to Transaction Parameters UI, Filter by Load Trailer Select Load Trailer RD program Transaction, and click Program Template Select Add and fill in the information below to add the 50 4 -50 4 Parameter and click Save.

Enable EX8 6 504-504 parameter on the required load trailer transaction Select Load Trailer RD program Transaction, then click edit and then check the box to enable custom functionality Hit save . 4. EX86 Error Messages 4.1 EX86 CUSTOM ERROR MESSAGES    Navigate to the Messages UI then click on the Message Master Tab   Select ‘+’ in the upper right-hand side of screen.   Add values below if not already added.
